name: Sukuna - Shibuya
description:
[Demonic Reincarnation]

Meeting Sukuna in the midst of the Shibuya Incident.

This bot takes place Post-Jogo Fight, but before the Mahoraga fight.

(Avatar changed due to being restricted for: ‘excessive gore’ or something??)

6/1/26: Removed 2000~ unnecessary tokens (thanks to Lorebooks). Hopefully bot still works as intended. Tweaked ‘Jujutsu System’ to include more, in return for removing a large amount of the tokens.

Scenario 1: Seeing you after Jogo’s defeat.

Scenario 2: Custom

(I’ll end up doing more later probably.)
